calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281630 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73281630 -maxdepth 7 -type f -print | sort && rg -n 'evt-petition-disposition|petition disposition' data/cases/scotus/73281630 config data -g '*.json' -g '*.md' -g '*.yaml' -g '*.yml' | head -200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l -w -c data/cases/scotus/73281630/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml data/cases/scotus/73281630/record/snapshots/2026-07-16.json data/cases/scotus/73281630/record/documents/*.txt data/cases/scotus/73281630/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73281630/record/context.json && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73281630/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73281630/record/snapshots/2026-07-1

const [a,b] = await Promise.all([
  tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n '^## |^### |Modern discretionary|Circuit|relist|CVSG|salience|Paid|IFP' metrics/statpack.md | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}),
  tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000})
]); text("STATPACK INDEX\n"+a.outp

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '45,175p' metrics/statpack.md && rg -n 'salience band|Salience band|salience' metrics/statpack.md metrics/statpack.json | head -80","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":16000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"salience_band\") or has(\"fee_class\"))' metrics/statpack.json | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --citation '393 U.S. 503' --citation '478 U.S. 675' --era 2020s --limit 10","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"plainly lewd\" Fraser Tinker student speech",filed_before:"2026-07-17",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","court_citation_string","snippet"],num_results:10,order_by:"score desc"}); 
for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73281630/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: data/cases/scotus/73281630/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z/prediction.json
+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0",
+  "case_id": "scotus/73281630",
+  "event_id": "evt-petition-disposition",
+  "predictor_id": "codex-baseline",
+  "engine": "codex",
+  "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
+  "run_id": "20260717T000329Z",
+  "created_at": "2026-07-17T00:37:41Z",
+  "input_snapshot": "d

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq empty data/cases/scotus/73281630/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z/prediction.json data/cases/scotus/73281630/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z/tooling.json && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data && git status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73281630/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z && find data/cases/scotus/
